allow: Bash(python3 -c "import sys, json; lines = sys.stdin.read\(\).strip\(\).split\('\\n'\); [print\(json.loads\(l\).get\('content',''\)[:500] if isinstance\(json.loads\(l\).get\('content',''\), str\) else str\(json.loads\(l\).get\('content',''\)\)[:500]\) for l in lines[-10:] if l]")
